arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly reached an important agreement with star player Mohamed Salah over a new contract at long last. The Egypt international has been in world class form for Liverpool again this season, but there’s been the worrying saga over his future lurking in the background. arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Leicester City to Anfield in the Premier League on Boxing Day. Arne Slot’s side underlined their title credentials with a 6-3 win at Tottenham Hotspur last weekend to extend their advantage at the summit.
